machine_detail.machine_description: A series of oil-free rotary vane displacement pumps and compressors designed for industrial vacuum and pressure applications. The series includes vacuum pumps (KVT/DVT) and compressors (KDT).

maintenance.task: Check and clean air intake filter. Replace if clogged.
Vane inspection: check for minimum height, improper wear, or chipping.

spare_parts.name: Maintenance Kit (KVT/KDT 3.60)
spare_parts.description: Kit includes Carbon Vanes, Grease, and Filters for KVT/KDT 3.60 models.

spare_parts.name: Maintenance Kit (DVT 3.60)
spare_parts.description: Kit includes Carbon Vanes, Grease, and Filters for DVT 3.60 models.

spare_parts.name: Grease Tube
spare_parts.description: Grease for hand-packing bearings on applicable models.

spare_parts.name: Pre Filled Grease Gun
spare_parts.description: For greasing bearings on 3.100-3.140 models with grease nipples.

spare_parts.name: Dust Separation Cartridge
spare_parts.description: Standard wear part, replaced every 3000 hours.

spare_parts.name: Filter Cover Rubber Gasket
spare_parts.description: Gasket for the filter housing. Improper installation can cause vacuum/pressure loss.

spare_parts.name: Motor Bearings
spare_parts.description: suggested by llm, needs review and specificaiton manually
